MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James H. Ghilotti of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for Plaintiff's Firm Brayton Purcell.

RULING: BRAYTON PURCELL'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF
No appearance by plaintiff Marie Spurling. No opposition and tentative ruling adopted: Nancy Williams, Brayton Purcell's motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Marie Spurling is granted. Brayton Purcell provided proper notice to Ms. Spurling pursuant to CRC 3.1362 and the Court has received no opposition. Hearing required unless Brayton Purcell notifies Ms. Spurling of this tentative ruling and she states that she does not wish to contest. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
